entities.name: ARSENIC
entities.description: A toxic contaminant found in drinking water and foods

entities.name: ARSENIC BIOREMEDIATION
entities.description: The process of reducing arsenic availability using potent bacteria

entities.name: AKS4C
entities.description: A strain of Micrococcus luteus isolated from arsenic contaminated water

entities.name: PURBASTHALI
entities.description: The location in West Bengal, India where AKS4C was isolated

entities.name: WEST BENGAL
entities.description: The state in India where AKS4C was isolated

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where AKS4C was isolated

entities.name: MICROCOCCUS LUTEUS
entities.description: The bacterial species to which strain AKS4C belongs

entities.name: GENOMIC ISLANDS
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with metal-resistant genes in AKS4C

entities.name: METAL-RESISTANT GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide resistance to various metals

entities.name: ARSENATE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of AKS4C to tolerate arsenate concentrations up to 46,800 mg/L

entities.name: ARSENITE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of AKS4C to tolerate arsenite concentrations up to 390 mg/L

entities.name: ARSENATE
entities.description: A form of arsenic that is less toxic than arsenite

entities.name: ARSENITE
entities.description: A form of arsenic that is more toxic than arsenate

entities.name: MULTI-METAL TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of AKS4C to tolerate metals such as Fe, Pb, Mo, Mn, and Zn

entities.name: ARSENITE OXIDATION
entities.description: The ability of AKS4C to oxidize arsenite to arsenate

entities.name: ARSENIC ADSORPTION
entities.description: The property of AKS4C to adsorb arsenic

entities.name: X-RAY FLUORESCENCE
entities.description: An analytical technique used to confirm arsenic adsorption

entities.name: FOURIER TRANSFORM INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: An analytical technique used to confirm arsenic adsorption

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTION
entities.description: The ability of AKS4C to enhance plant growth

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID
entities.description: A plant growth-promoting hormone produced by AKS4C

entities.name: GIBBERELLIC ACID
entities.description: A plant growth-promoting hormone produced by AKS4C

entities.name: PROLINE
entities.description: An amino acid produced by AKS4C that promotes plant growth

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop whose seedling growth was enhanced by AKS4C

entities.name: SEEDLING GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of rice seedlings enhanced by AKS4C

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING RHIZOBACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that colonize the rhizosphere and promote plant growth
